author: Mark Atwood
text: Trait design decision needed. SigningBackend::algorithm() is sync but pkcs11 needs HSM I/O on cold cache. Options: (a) error-if-uncached forces callers to call sign() first to warm the cache, (b) add async prime_algorithm() to trait, (c) accept the limitation with docs. Recommend (c) for now since sign() already warms the cache as a side-effect and the doc comment warns callers. Revisit if users hit this.
